This game is full of cheaters in the online mode. Players constantly cheat, don't pass the ball and talk trash when you don't make a shot. It is way too easy to steal the ball and the only thing that works to block a shot is to physically jump to even be able to come close to blocking a shot. There are countless numbers of 
people who use glitches or whatever the hell they use to make every shot and this makes the game not fun at all. I basically hang out under the basket and wait for my ball hogging teammate to shot and I turn their shot into an alley oop. I have been playing this game for over two years and you developers have done NOTHING to change this crap. I feel like I got cheated out of my 30 bucks because the online experience of this game is straight BS! And why don't you have full court mode on single player? I think you should do that

reviews.review_title: I really wanna like this game.
reviews.review_description:
Lemme preface that this game is fine and well made and loads of fun in theory. But in practice it is an unplayable toxic mess. I can't even find a server of people ready to play even when it says there's space, and if I do, no one wants to start a game and are just shooting around. 

If I do finally get into a casual game it's just not fun. Everyone who clearly knows and plays basketball just sits in these lobbies and craps all over you. If they're on your team, they'll never pass to you because you missed one shot and talk crap at you for anything. If they're on the other team they'll just troll you because there isn't a shot clock (it's meant to be street basketball I know). 

The stealing is so I consistent too and I just can't even move the ball. I know this is likely partly a skill issue on my part, but it feels like I cannot get the ball from the other player no matter what I do even when I see my hand hit the ball. But when I have the ball it's stolen in one second, so all I can do is just shoot a 3 which misses and my toxic teammate gets mad and will not pass to me anymore. I'm sure if I dribbled better or was better at basketball this wouldn't happen but my god I can't even practice against real people, because again every single casual lobby is full of toxic guys who are good at basketball instead of just playing competitive. 

I wanna like and play this game because it's fun, but I can't find a single fun online game. I either get crushed in a casual lobby, or might as well not be there and won't get passed to.

Also make the game more realistic and better quotes for the Al like vou think we say "out of all the goats your the goatesty!" No make them talk trash like we do. And what kind of name is "All good" or "Now you see me" give the Al some realistic names like Jeremiah or Justin there's so much more to name but im not typing all thateople who love basketball

This is a great basketball simulator. It really feels like playing. I love the vibe and sounds of the campaign and all the replayability it offers. The only thing that took me out of immersion every once in a while was that there is so much physical movement that it is quite easy to leave your playspace, especially if you only have a very limited one.

reviews.review_title: The best VR baskedball game ever
reviews.review_description:
Blacktop Hoops is the best VR basketball game

Blacktop Hoops is probably the best VR basketball game I’ve ever played. The mechanics feel just right — the ball handling is great, and dribbling, tricks, shooting, and dunks all feel smooth and satisfying.

Since I play basketball in real life, this game is especially fun for me. Being able to do crossovers and dunk without leaving home is amazing and really immersive.

The graphics are also great, and there are many different courts to match your mood.

There are multiple modes: you can play solo, against AI, or online with other players. The AI is actually pretty challenging on the highest difficulty.

Overall, I highly recommend it.
15/10, 5 stars — an amazing game

This game is very unrealistic for 2 reasons 1 you can steal the ball through the other person’s body and there is no up and down violations in this game so it makes it very annoying to play against a kid that spams jump in the dribbling doesn’t work half the time . Just save your money and download big Ballers.

Blacktop Hoops is a fun, fast-paced basketball experience that really captures the energy of streetball. What makes it stand out is how simple it is to jump into—there’s no complicated setup, and you can start playing almost immediately. The game focuses more on quick moves, flashy plays, and scoring than strict realism, which makes it exciting and easy to enjoy.

The controls are smooth and responsive, letting you pull off crossovers, step-backs, and dunks without feeling clunky. It feels rewarding when you outplay someone with skill instead of just luck. The street-style atmosphere also adds to the vibe, making it feel more relaxed and creative compared to organized basketball games.

One downside is that it can feel a little repetitive after a while if you’re playing solo a lot, since there isn’t always a huge variety of modes or challenges. But if you’re playing with friends or against real people, it stays fun much longer.

Overall, Blacktop Hoops is a great choice if you like basketball but want something more casual and flashy instead of super serious. It’s all about style, speed, and having fun on the court.
